label: 451a Repealed. , ,Pub. L. 113–287, § 7128 Stat. 3272Dec. 19, 2014
notes: Section, (part), , limited further extension or establishment of national parks in Wyoming. See , National Park Service and Related Programs. Section comprised only part of the last sentence of section 1 of act . The remainder of such section, except that part of the last sentence which repealed sections 406 to 406d of this title, was classified to section 406d–1 and former .act Sept. 14, 1950, ch. 950, § 164 Stat. 849section 104907 of Title 54section 431a of this titleSept. 14, 1950
